title: EQ - Button to change preset is present
scenario: EQ preset button displays default Bass preset in Device Settings for supported Poly devices
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
expected: The EQ tab displays a headline and a button to change the EQ preset below it. The default preset is set to "Bass". Available presets include: Bass, Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
